_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: 3DPrintForge
author: skynett81@github.com
description: Self-hosted dashboard for 17 printer brands (Bambu Lab, Snapmaker, Prusa, OctoPrint, Creality, Elegoo, Voron, AnkerMake, QIDI, RatRig, Duet/RRF, FlashForge, Repetier, and any Klipper/Moonraker printer). Includes native slicer, Slicer Studio with profiles, Scene Composer with CSG, AI Model Forge, Mesh Repair, real-time status, camera feeds, print history, print queue with load balancing, filament inventory, and 7 notification channels (Telegram, Discord, Email, Webhook, ntfy, Pushover, SMS).
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE:-true}" = "true" ]; then git config --global --add safe.directory /home/container 2>/dev/null; git pull --ff-only 2>&1 || true; npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; fi; NODE_ENV=production node server/index.js

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ffmpeg ca-certificates openssl curl gnupg

# Install Node.js 22 (installer image parkervcp/installers:debian has no node/npm)
if ! command -v node >/dev/null; then
  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  apt-get install -y nodejs
fi

cd /mnt/server

# Installer container UID differs from server UID; trust the mounted directory
git config --global --add safe.directory /mnt/server

if [ -d .git ]; then
  git pull
else
  git clone https://github.com/skynett81/3dprintforge.git .
fi

# --ignore-scripts skips postinstall which tries to build the docs website
npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts

mkdir -p data data/uploads data/library data/model-cache data/history-models data/toolpath-cache data/printer-images certs

echo "Installation complete"

variables.name: Auth Password
variables.description: Set a password to enable authentication. Leave empty to disable auth.

variables.name: Auth Username
variables.description: Optional username for authentication. Only used if Auth Password is set.

variables.name: Demo Mode
variables.description: Set to true to run with simulated demo printers (no real hardware needed).

variables.name: Printer IP
variables.description: IP address of your Bambu Lab printer. For multiple printers, use the Settings panel in the dashboard.

variables.name: Printer Serial
variables.description: Serial number of the printer (found in Settings > Device on the printer screen).

variables.name: Printer Access Code
variables.description: LAN access code (found in Settings > WiFi/Network on the printer screen).

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: GitHub personal access token for auto-update checks. Only needed for private repositories or to avoid rate limits.

variables.name: Slicer Path
variables.description: Optional absolute path to OrcaSlicer/PrusaSlicer/BambuStudio/SnapmakerOrca CLI for the Slicer Bridge. Auto-detected if installed via Flatpak or AppImage.

variables.name: Require Auth
variables.description: Set to true to require authentication on all dashboard requests. Use with Auth Password.

variables.name: Public Host
variables.description: Public hostname(s) and/or IP(s) users connect to. Comma-separated for multiple, e.g. 'node2.geektech.no,185.243.217.246'. Shown in startup banner instead of internal container IP. Leave blank to auto-detect.

variables.name: Bambu Cloud Region
variables.description: Region for Bambu Cloud broker when a printer uses Cloud Mode. eu (default) | us | cn. Match this to your Bambu account region.

variables.name: Thingiverse API Key
variables.description: Optional Thingiverse API key for searching/importing models in the Library. Get one at thingiverse.com/developers/apps.

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: Server log verbosity: debug | info (default) | warn | error. Use debug to diagnose connection or migration issues.

variables.name: Trusted Proxies
variables.description: Comma-separated list of upstream proxy IPs (e.g. Cloudflare ranges). Required for correct client IP in logs and rate-limiting when traffic goes through a reverse proxy. Leave blank when accessed directly.

variables.name: Disable Telemetry
variables.description: Set to true to disable the anonymous startup ping to the update server (privacy mode).

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest code from GitHub on every restart (true) or freeze on the currently installed version (false). When true, restart in Wisp = update.

variables.name: Auto-create Spools from AMS
variables.description: When AMS reports a loaded filament tray that isn't linked to a spool, automatically create one in Inventory. Default true so filament weight is tracked out of the box. Set false if you only want manually-managed spools.
